recommendations.title: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him.

recommendations.title: The Paper Tigers
recommendations.overview: Three middle aged men polish their martial arts skills to avenge their fallen master.

recommendations.title: Chick Fight
recommendations.overview: When Anna Wyncomb is introduced to an underground, all-female fight club in order to turn the mess of her life around, she discovers she is much more personally connected to the history of the club than she could ever imagine.

recommendations.title: The Last Dragon
recommendations.overview: A young man searches for the "master" to obtain the final level of martial arts mastery known as the glow. Along the way he must fight an evil martial arts expert and rescue a beautiful singer from an obsessed music promoter.

recommendations.title: Harry Brown
recommendations.overview: An elderly ex-serviceman and widower looks to avenge his best friend's murder by doling out his own form of justice.

recommendations.title: Bloodsport III
recommendations.overview: Bloodsport III brings us back to the world of Alex Cardo. This time he must battle in a fight to end all fights - The Kumite, the most vicious warrior alive - Beast. He must not only battle for his own honor, but also avenge the death of Sun, his men

recommendations.title: Bloodsport II

recommendations.title: Who Killed Captain Alex?
recommendations.overview: Recognized as Uganda’s first action film, Who Killed Captain Alex? is about the aftermath of a police raid in Kampala in which a police captain is killed.

recommendations.title: The Butterfly Effect 3: Revelations

recommendations.title: The Rundown
